---
title: "Monthly Solid Fuels Statistics: Lignite Marketable Production Forecast"
author: "Hayri Akyıldız"
date: "`r format(Sys.Date(), '%d %B %Y')`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    number_sections: true
    code_folding: show
    theme: flatly
    highlight: tango
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global ayarlar
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.width  = 10,
  fig.height = 6
)
```

```{r}
# Gerekli paketlerin yüklenmesi
library(tuikr)
library(httr)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(forecast)
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)

# ── Çıktı Klasörlerinin Otomatik Oluşturulması ──────────
dir.create("outputs/figures", recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create("outputs/tables",  recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# ── Doğruluk (Accuracy) Ölçüm Fonksiyonu ────────────────
calc_accuracy <- function(actual, fitted_vals, method_name, next_fc) {
  errors <- actual - fitted_vals
  valid  <- !is.na(errors) & !is.na(actual)
  if (sum(valid) == 0) return(NULL)
  
  e <- errors[valid]; a <- actual[valid]; n_e <- length(e)
  bias <- mean(e); mad <- mean(abs(e)); mse <- mean(e^2)
  mape <- mean(abs(e / a) * 100)
  rsfe_vec <- cumsum(e)
  mad_run  <- cumsum(abs(e)) / seq_len(n_e)
  ts_vec   <- rsfe_vec / mad_run
  
  data.frame(
    Method = method_name, Bias = round(bias, 0), MAD = round(mad, 0),
    MSE = round(mse, 0), MAPE_pct = round(mape, 2),
    RSFE = round(tail(rsfe_vec, 1), 0),
    Tracking_Signal = round(tail(ts_vec, 1), 2),
    Next_Period_Forecast = round(as.numeric(next_fc), 0), stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}

# ── Grafik Çizim ve Kaydetme Fonksiyonu ─────────────────
plot_forecast <- function(dates, actual, fitted, next_date, next_fc, method_lbl, file_name) {
  df_main <- data.frame(Date = dates, Actual = actual, Fitted = fitted)
  df_fc   <- data.frame(Date = next_date, Fitted = as.numeric(next_fc))
  
  p <- ggplot() +
    geom_line(data = df_main, aes(x = Date, y = Actual, colour = "Gerçek Değer"), linewidth = 0.8) +
    geom_line(data = df_main[!is.na(df_main$Fitted), ], aes(x = Date, y = Fitted, colour = method_lbl), linewidth = 0.8, linetype = "dashed") +
    geom_point(data = df_fc, aes(x = Date, y = Fitted, colour = "Tahmin"), size = 4, shape = 17) +
    scale_colour_manual(values = c("Gerçek Değer" = "steelblue", "Tahmin" = "red3", setNames("darkorange", method_lbl))) +
    labs(title = paste0(method_lbl, " — Gerçekleşen ve Tahmin Edilen"), subtitle = "Linyit Satılabilir Üretim Miktarı (Ton)", x = "Tarih", y = "Ton", colour = "Gösterge") +
    theme_minimal() + theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  ggsave(file.path("outputs", "figures", file_name), p, width = 10, height = 6, dpi = 150)
  return(p)
}
```

```{r}
# TÜİK Enerji Teması üzerinden tablonun bağlantısını çek
enerji_tablolari <- statistical_tables("5")

# Türkçe karakter hatası almamak için İngilizce ve joker karakterle arama
kati_yakut_tablo <- enerji_tablolari %>% 
  filter(grepl("solid|kat.*yak", table_name, ignore.case = TRUE), grepl("istab", node_type, ignore.case = TRUE))

kati_yakut_url <- kati_yakut_tablo$table_url[1]

# Güvenlik kontrolü
if(is.na(kati_yakut_url)) stop("TÜİK API'den bağlantı alınamadı!")

# Bot korumasını aşarak veriyi geçici belleğe (tmp) indir
tmp_xls <- tempfile(fileext = ".xls")
resp <- GET(
  url = kati_yakut_url,
  add_headers(`User-Agent` = "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) Chrome/120.0.0.0"),
  write_disk(tmp_xls, overwrite = TRUE)
)
stop_for_status(resp)

# TÜİK kapak sayfalarını atlamak için en çok satırı olan asıl sayfayı bul
sayfalar <- excel_sheets(tmp_xls)
en_dolu_sayfa <- sayfalar[1]
max_satir <- 0
for(s in sayfalar) {
  gecici_df <- read_excel(tmp_xls, sheet = s, col_names = FALSE)
  if(nrow(gecici_df) > max_satir) {
    max_satir <- nrow(gecici_df)
    en_dolu_sayfa <- s
  }
}

df_raw <- read_excel(tmp_xls, sheet = en_dolu_sayfa, col_names = FALSE)
cat("Veri başarıyla indirildi. Analiz edilen sayfa:", en_dolu_sayfa, "\n")
```

```{r data-cleaning}
# 1. Yıl Sütununu Bul
yil_col <- 1
for(i in 1:min(5, ncol(df_raw))) {
  if(sum(grepl("^20[0-2][0-9]$", as.character(df_raw[[i]]))) > 5) {
    yil_col <- i
    break
  }
}

# 2. Sadece "Linyit" Bölümüne Odaklan
linyit_satir <- which(apply(df_raw, 1, function(x) any(grepl("linyit|lignite|l\u0130ny\u0130t", as.character(x), ignore.case = TRUE))))[1]
if(is.na(linyit_satir)) linyit_satir <- 1

# 3. Veri Sütununu Bul
veri_baslangic_col <- yil_col + 1
if(sum(grepl("^20[0-2][0-9]$", as.character(df_raw[[veri_baslangic_col]]))) > 5) {
  veri_baslangic_col <- veri_baslangic_col + 1
}

# 4. AKILLI MATRİS TARAMASI (Mükerrer Kömür Türlerini Engeller)
df_clean <- data.frame()
alinan_yillar <- c() # Hafıza: Aynı yılı 2. kez almamak için

for(i in linyit_satir:nrow(df_raw)) {
  yil_str <- as.character(df_raw[[yil_col]][i])
  yil_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(yil_str))
  
  # Eğer bu bir Yıl satırıysa ve DAHA ÖNCE ALINMADIYSA (Sadece Linyit'i alır)
  if(!is.na(yil_num) && yil_num >= 2000 && yil_num <= 2030 && !(yil_num %in% alinan_yillar)) {
    son_col <- min(ncol(df_raw), veri_baslangic_col + 11)
    aylik_degerler <- as.character(df_raw[i, veri_baslangic_col:son_col])
    
    if(length(aylik_degerler) < 12) {
      aylik_degerler <- c(aylik_degerler, rep(NA, 12 - length(aylik_degerler)))
    }
    
    # Format Temizliği
    aylik_degerler <- gsub("\\s+", "", aylik_degerler)
    aylik_degerler <- gsub("-", NA, aylik_degerler)
    aylik_degerler <- gsub("\\.", "", aylik_degerler)
    aylik_degerler <- gsub(",", ".", aylik_degerler)
    aylik_degerler_num <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(aylik_degerler))
    
    temp_df <- data.frame(Yil = yil_num, Ay = 1:12, Value = aylik_degerler_num)
    df_clean <- rbind(df_clean, temp_df)
    alinan_yillar <- c(alinan_yillar, yil_num) # Yılı hafızaya kaydet, bir daha alma!
  }
}

# Gelecek (henüz gelmemiş) ayları sil ve sıraya diz
df_clean <- df_clean[!is.na(df_clean$Value), ]
df_clean <- df_clean[order(df_clean$Yil, df_clean$Ay), ]

if(nrow(df_clean) == 0) stop("Matris taraması başarısız. Lütfen Excel verisini kontrol edin.")

# 5. Zaman Serisi Objesini (ts) Oluştur
value <- df_clean$Value            
n <- length(value)             
t_idx <- seq_len(n)                
ts_data <- ts(value, start = c(df_clean$Yil[1], df_clean$Ay[1]), frequency = 12) 
m_factor <- cycle(ts_data)            

ay_adlari <- c("Ocak","Şubat","Mart","Nisan","Mayıs","Haziran","Temmuz","Ağustos","Eylül","Ekim","Kasım","Aralık")
dates <- seq(as.Date(paste(df_clean$Yil[1], df_clean$Ay[1], "01", sep = "-")), by = "month", length.out = n)
last_cycle <- tail(m_factor, 1)
next_cycle <- ifelse(last_cycle == 12, 1, last_cycle + 1)
last_date <- tail(dates, 1)
next_date <- seq(last_date, by = "month", length.out = 2)[2]
target_year <- ifelse(next_cycle == 1, tail(df_clean$Yil, 1) + 1, tail(df_clean$Yil, 1))

cat("=====================================\n")
cat("TOPLAM GÖZLEM SAYISI :", n, "Ay\n")
cat("İLK GÖZLEM           :", ay_adlari[df_clean$Ay[1]], df_clean$Yil[1], "\n")
cat("SON GÖZLEM           :", ay_adlari[last_cycle], tail(df_clean$Yil, 1), "\n")
cat("TAHMİN HEDEF DÖNEMİ  :", ay_adlari[next_cycle], target_year, "\n")
cat("=====================================\n")
```

```{r}
naive_fit <- c(NA_real_, head(value, n - 1))
naive_next <- tail(value, 1)
naive_acc <- calc_accuracy(value, naive_fit, "Naive Tahmin", naive_next)
plot_forecast(dates, value, naive_fit, next_date, naive_next, "Naive", "naive_forecast_plot.png")
```

```{r}
k_ma <- 12
ma_fit <- rep(NA_real_, n)
for (i in (k_ma + 1):n) ma_fit[i] <- mean(value[(i - k_ma):(i - 1)])
ma_next <- mean(tail(value, k_ma))
ma_acc <- calc_accuracy(value, ma_fit, "Hareketli Ortalama (12)", ma_next)
plot_forecast(dates, value, ma_fit, next_date, ma_next, "HO(12)", "moving_average_plot.png")
```

```{r}
k_wma <- 6
w_raw <- seq_len(k_wma)
w <- w_raw / sum(w_raw)
wma_fit <- rep(NA_real_, n)
for (i in (k_wma + 1):n) wma_fit[i] <- sum(w * value[(i - k_wma):(i - 1)])
wma_next <- sum(w * tail(value, k_wma))
wma_acc <- calc_accuracy(value, wma_fit, "Agirlikli HO (6)", wma_next)
plot_forecast(dates, value, wma_fit, next_date, wma_next, "AHO(6)", "weighted_moving_average_plot.png")
```

```{r}
es_model <- ses(ts_data, h = 1)
es_fit <- as.numeric(es_model$fitted)
es_next <- as.numeric(es_model$mean)
es_acc <- calc_accuracy(value, es_fit, "Ust. Duzeltme (SES)", es_next)
plot_forecast(dates, value, es_fit, next_date, es_next, "SES", "exponential_smoothing_plot.png")
```

```{r}
holt_model <- holt(ts_data, h = 1)
holt_fit <- as.numeric(holt_model$fitted)
holt_next <- as.numeric(holt_model$mean)
holt_acc <- calc_accuracy(value, holt_fit, "Trend Duzeltmeli (Holt)", holt_next)
plot_forecast(dates, value, holt_fit, next_date, holt_next, "Holt", "trend_adjusted_smoothing_plot.png")
```

```{r}
trend_lm <- lm(value ~ t_idx)
trend_fit <- as.numeric(fitted(trend_lm))
trend_next <- predict(trend_lm, newdata = data.frame(t_idx = n + 1))
trend_acc <- calc_accuracy(value, trend_fit, "Dogrusal Trend", trend_next)
plot_forecast(dates, value, trend_fit, next_date, trend_next, "Dogrusal Trend", "trend_projection_plot.png")
```

```{r}
decomp_mult <- decompose(ts_data, type = "multiplicative")
si_trend <- as.numeric(decomp_mult$trend)
si_ratios <- value / si_trend
SI_raw <- tapply(si_ratios, m_factor, mean, na.rm = TRUE)
SI <- SI_raw * (12 / sum(SI_raw))

deseas <- value / SI[m_factor]
si_lm <- lm(deseas ~ t_idx)
si_fit <- as.numeric(predict(si_lm)) * SI[m_factor]
si_next <- predict(si_lm, newdata = data.frame(t_idx = n + 1)) * SI[next_cycle]
si_acc <- calc_accuracy(value, si_fit, "Mevsimsel Indeksler", si_next)
plot_forecast(dates, value, si_fit, next_date, si_next, "Mevs. Indeksler", "seasonal_indices_plot.png")
```

```{r}
decomp_add <- decompose(ts_data, type = "additive")
add_trend <- as.numeric(decomp_add$trend)
valid_add <- !is.na(add_trend)
add_lm <- lm(add_trend[valid_add] ~ t_idx[valid_add])
add_tfc <- predict(add_lm, newdata = data.frame(t_idx = t_idx))

add_fit <- add_tfc + as.numeric(decomp_add$seasonal)
add_next_t <- predict(add_lm, newdata = data.frame(t_idx = n + 1))
add_next <- as.numeric(add_next_t) + as.numeric(decomp_add$seasonal)[next_cycle]
add_acc <- calc_accuracy(value, add_fit, "Toplamsal Ayristirma", add_next)
plot_forecast(dates, value, add_fit, next_date, add_next, "Toplamsal", "additive_decomposition_plot.png")
```

```{r}
mult_trend <- as.numeric(decomp_mult$trend)
valid_mult <- !is.na(mult_trend)
mult_lm <- lm(mult_trend[valid_mult] ~ t_idx[valid_mult])
mult_tfc <- predict(mult_lm, newdata = data.frame(t_idx = t_idx))

mult_fit <- mult_tfc * as.numeric(decomp_mult$seasonal)
mult_next_t <- predict(mult_lm, newdata = data.frame(t_idx = n + 1))
mult_next <- as.numeric(mult_next_t) * as.numeric(decomp_mult$seasonal)[next_cycle]
mult_acc <- calc_accuracy(value, mult_fit, "Carpimsal Ayristirma", mult_next)
plot_forecast(dates, value, mult_fit, next_date, mult_next, "Carpimsal", "multiplicative_decomposition_plot.png")
```

```{r}
month_f <- factor(m_factor, levels = 1:12)
reg_lm <- lm(value ~ t_idx + month_f)
reg_fit <- as.numeric(fitted(reg_lm))
reg_next <- predict(reg_lm, newdata = data.frame(t_idx = n + 1, month_f = factor(next_cycle, levels = 1:12)))
reg_acc <- calc_accuracy(value, reg_fit, "Regresyon (Mevsimsel)", reg_next)
plot_forecast(dates, value, reg_fit, next_date, reg_next, "Reg+Mevsim", "regression_seasonal_dummy_plot.png")
```

```{r}
accuracy_tbl <- bind_rows(naive_acc, ma_acc, wma_acc, es_acc, holt_acc, trend_acc, si_acc, add_acc, mult_acc, reg_acc)
accuracy_tbl <- accuracy_tbl %>% arrange(MAPE_pct)

write.csv(accuracy_tbl, "outputs/tables/accuracy_comparison.csv", row.names = FALSE)

kable(accuracy_tbl, caption = "Tahmin Modelleri Performans Karşılaştırması", align = "c") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"), full_width = TRUE) %>%
  row_spec(1, bold = TRUE, background = "#d4edda")
```

```{r}
best_method <- accuracy_tbl$Method[1]
best_mape <- accuracy_tbl$MAPE_pct[1]
best_forecast <- accuracy_tbl$Next_Period_Forecast[1]

final_fc_df <- data.frame(
  Superior_Method = best_method, Target_Period = paste(ay_adlari[next_cycle], target_year),
  Forecasted_Value = best_forecast, MAPE_pct = best_mape
)
write.csv(final_fc_df, "outputs/tables/final_forecast.csv", row.names = FALSE)

cat("====================================================\n")
cat("SEÇİLEN ÜSTÜN MODEL      :", best_method, "\n")
cat("MODELİN HATA PAYI (MAPE) :", best_mape, "%\n")
cat("TAHMİN HEDEF DÖNEMİ      :", ay_adlari[next_cycle], target_year, "\n")
cat("BEKLENEN LİNYİT ÜRETİMİ  :", formatC(best_forecast, format="d", big.mark=","), "Ton\n")
cat("====================================================\n")
```
